name: Run

request.description:
This endpoint retrieves detailed information about a specific run using its hash ID.

These fields define details related to an individual squid run.

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **id** | String | Unique identifier of the squid run. |
| **object** | String | Type of returned object (always `run`). |
| **created_at** | Timestamp | Date and time when the run was initially created. |
| **started_at** | Timestamp | Date and time when the scraping run started executing. |
| **next_launch_at** | Timestamp | Scheduled date/time for the next execution (if recurring). |
| **ended_at** | Timestamp | Date and time when the scraping run completed or stopped. |
| **duration** | Float | Duration of the scraping run in seconds. |
| **credit_used** | Float | Total credits consumed during the run. |
| **origin** | String | Origin of the run initiation (e.g., `user`, `schedule`). |
| **status** | String | Current status of the squid run (see statuses below). |
| **export_time** | Timestamp | Date and time when export was generated. |
| **export_done** | Boolean | Indicates if the export was successfully generated. |
| **mail_done** | Boolean/Null | Indicates if email notifications have been sent. |
| **mail_time** | Timestamp | Time when the email notification was sent. |
| **total_results** | Integer | Total number of results collected. |
| **total_unique_results** | Integer | Number of unique results collected. |
| **crawler_id** | String | Identifier of the specific crawler used. |
| **done_reason** | String | Reason indicating why the run finished (see reasons below). |
| **done_reason_desc** | String/Null | Additional description providing context for `done_reason`. |
| **shared** | Boolean | Indicates if the run result is shared publicly. |
| **squid** | String | Secondary unique identifier linked to the scraping configuration. |

Each run starts with the initial status `PENDING` and goes through one or more transitional statuses before reaching one of the terminal statuses.

## Statuses (`status`):

The following are the potential statuses a run may have from initiation to completion.

| Status | Phase | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **PENDING** | 🕒 Waiting | Run is created and waiting to start execution. |
| **RUNNING** | 🔄 In Progress | Run is currently collecting data. |
| **UPLOADING** | 🔄 In Progress | Data collection is complete, now uploading/exporting results. |
| **PAUSED** | 🕒 Waiting but 🔄 In Progress | Run has been temporarily paused; it can resume or be aborted. |
| **ABORTED** | ✅ Completed | Run was manually stopped before completion. |
| **DONE** | ✅ Completed | Run finished all tasks and exported the results successfully. |
| **ERROR** | 🕒 Waiting or ✅ Completed | Run failed due to an error (if an error is based on user input, it will be considered completed). |

Each run moves through these statuses sequentially based on its execution lifecycle.

## Done Reasons (`done_reason`):

These reasons indicate why a scraping run concluded, either successfully or unsuccessfully.

| Done Reason | Description |
| --- | --- |
| **maintenance_fees_not_paid** | Maintenance fees for this custom module have not been paid. |
| **deactivated** | Run has been deactivated. |
| **no_credits_left** | No credits remaining. |
| **too_many_requests** | Run stopped due to excessive requests. |
| **checkpoint_reached** | Account is blocked at a checkpoint (manual verification required). |
| **otp_needed** | OTP verification required; please re-sync accounts. |
| **batch_wait** | Current batch completed; awaiting timeout. |
| **no_account_available** | No available accounts; refresh required. _(Account refers to scraper-linked accounts such as Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter, etc.)_ |
| **wrong_credentials** | Account credentials invalid. _(Account refers to scraper-linked accounts such as Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter, etc.)_ |
| **aborted** | Scraping run manually aborted by user. |
| **tasks_done** | All assigned tasks completed successfully. |
| **slots_limit_exceeded** | Scraping slots limit exceeded. |
| **limit_exceeded** | Scraper-linked account limit exceeded. _(Account refers to scraper-linked accounts such as Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter, etc.)_ |
| **cookies_expired** | Scraper-linked account cookies expired; renewal required. _(Account refers to scraper-linked accounts such as Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter, etc.)_ |
| **no_accounts** | No scraper-linked accounts available to initiate run. |
| **last_invoice_not_paid** | Previous invoice payment pending. |
| **export_fix** | Export regenerated successfully after previous failure. |

Each run concludes with one specific reason, clearly indicating the cause of completion or termination.

response.name: Example
response.body:
{
    "id": "0393be3ea6f74986906153df1c3f9894",
    "object": "run",
    "created_at": "2025-02-04T10:26:50.847633",
    "started_at": "2025-02-04T10:25:41.623683",
    "next_launch_at": null,
    "ended_at": "2025-02-04T10:26:52.222239",
    "duration": 50.1833,
    "credit_used": 50.1833,
    "origin": "user",
    "status": "aborted",
    "export_time": "2025-02-04T10:26:53.780636",
    "export_done": true,
    "mail_done": null,
    "mail_time": null,
    "total_results": 40,
    "total_unique_results": 40,
    "crawler_id": "4734d096159ef05210e0e1677e8be823",
    "done_reason": "aborted",
    "done_reason_desc": null,
    "shared": false,
    "squid": "e445405ef4ab41208ef7d29b92a1a9dd"
}

request.description: This endpoint retrieves a paginated list of all runs for a specific squid.

request.description: This endpoint initiates a new run for a specified squid, starting the scraping process for all tasks within that squid.

response.name: Example
response.body:
{
    "id": "dd3473abe4cb41b683551e851edded94",
    "object": "run",
    "squid": "b6c56d18cb0046949461ba9ca278e8ad",
    "is_done": false,
    "started_at": "2025-02-10T14:27:45Z",
    "total_results": 0,
    "total_unique_results": 0,
    "next_launch_at": null,
    "ended_at": null,
    "duration": 0,
    "credit_used": 0,
    "origin": "user",
    "force_launch": false,
    "status": "pending",
    "export_done": null,
    "export_count": 0,
    "export_time": null,
    "email_done": null,
    "email_time": null,
    "created_at": "2025-02-10T14:27:45Z",
    "done_reason": null,
    "done_reason_desc": null
}

request.description: This endpoint aborts an active run using its hash ID.

response.name: Example
response.body:
{
    "id": "300e9c5c127d421c90f431478d9a2cfb",
    "object": "run",

    "total_results": 6,
    "total_unique_results": 6,
    "next_launch_at": null,
    "ended_at": "2025-02-10T14:31:10Z",
    "duration": 10.4498,
    "credit_used": 10.4498,
    "origin": "user",
    "force_launch": false,
    "status": "uploading",
    "export_done": null,
    "export_count": 0,
    "export_time": null,
    "email_done": null,

    "done_reason": "aborted",
    "done_reason_desc": null
}

request.description: This endpoint retrieves detailed statistics about a specific run using its hash ID.
This endpoint retrieves a paginated list of all tasks executed within a specific run.
This endpoint generates a temporary download URL for the results of a specific run.

description: The execution instance of a squid's tasks at a specific time. Tracks the progress, status, and results of tasks being processed during a particular execution window.
